description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural brown finish and a slightly glossy sheen. The barrel is smooth and tapers down to a narrower handle, which is wrapped in a light-colored grip tape for improved handling. There is a gold-colored logo or marking on the barrel, adding a touch of detail and indicating branding. The knob at the end of the handle is rounded and slightly flared, typical of traditional baseball bats. The bat appears well-crafted, with a seamless transition between the barrel and handle. Its overall appearance suggests it is designed for both recreational and professional use in urban parks, sports fields, or garages.
description: A polished wooden baseball bat with a light grip tape handle and gold logo on the barrel. The bat features a smooth brown finish and a rounded knob at the end.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bat, with the gold logo on the barrel and the grip tape on the handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the taper from the barrel to the handle and the extended length of the grip tape.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the barrel and the straight alignment of the bat.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the grip tape and the knob at the handle's end, with less visibility of the logo.
attribute_brand_logo: Gold oval logo with text, located on the barrel, medium size, gold color.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Light-colored, possibly white or gray, grip tape wrapped in a spiral pattern around the handle, smooth texture, no visible designs or logos.
attribute_barrel_markings: Gold oval logo with text on the barrel, no other visible graphics or decals.
attribute_end_cap_design: Rounded wooden knob, same brown color as the bat, no distinct end cap or markings.
